policies.profiles: Users can only read and update their own profile
policies.resumes: Users can only read, update, and delete their own resumes. Public read access for specific resume IDs if needed (though currently handled via PublicResume page which uses service role or anon key with proper RLS)
policies.applications: Users can only read, insert, and delete their own applications
policies.cover_letters: Users can only read and insert their own cover letters
policies.job_alerts: Users can only read, insert, update, and delete their own job alerts
